metadata.description: Name of the Azure Data Factory instance
Fully qualified SQL server name (e.g., sql-skillable-xxxx.database.windows.net)
Azure Key Vault name containing ADF secrets
Key Vault secret name for SQL admin password
Key Vault secret name for Skillable API key

typeProperties.connectionString: [concat('Data Source=', parameters('sqlServerName'), ';Initial Catalog=', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), ';User ID=', parameters('sqlAdminUser'), ';Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False')]
